description_long: This is a modern bungalow with a flat roof, featuring a mix of wood, glass, and concrete materials. The structure is elevated on stilts and includes a large wraparound deck, a swimming pool, and a landscaped garden area. Expansive floor-to-ceiling windows dominate the facade, providing ample natural light and a seamless indoor-outdoor connection. The building has multiple levels, with a rooftop terrace and a carport visible on one side. A long driveway or walkway extends from the main entrance, leading to the street. The overall design is sleek and contemporary, with clean lines and an open, airy layout.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large glass windows, wood paneling, a wraparound deck, pool, and rooftop terrace, set on stilts with a long driveway.
description_view_0: This view highlights the pool, landscaped garden, and the main deck area, with the carport and rooftop terrace visible.
description_view_1: From above, the flat roof, rooftop terrace, and the arrangement of outdoor spaces, including the pool and driveway, are prominent.
description_view_2: This angle emphasizes the long driveway leading to the entrance, the elevated structure, and the extensive use of glass and wood.
description_view_3: The rear view shows the stilted foundation, garden area, and the back entrance, with the driveway extending outward.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large floor-to-ceiling windows and grouped side windows
